calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff L1 Holding As Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Manifold Partners, a Delaware limited liability company, and Grail Partners LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and for plaintiff's motion for attorney fees.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR #11216. Telephone: 415-509-7557.

J. Raul Alcantar, Esq. for plaintiff L1 Holding AS, a Norwegian limited company.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Manifold Partners, a Delaware limited liability company, or Grail Partners LLC, a Delaware limited liability company
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 10, 2018.
Defaults were entered against defendants Manifold Partners, a Delaware limited liability company, and Grail Partners LLC, a Delaware limited liability company on February 23, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 23, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 24, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff L1 Holding AS, a Norwegian limited company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Manifold Partners, a Delaware limited liability company, and Grail Partners LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, as follows:

Damages - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,542.27.
Attorney Fees - $14,644.50.
Costs - $1,036.00.

Total - $72,222.77.

Additionally, at Mr. Alcantar's request, plaintiff's motion for attorney fees is taken OFF CALENDAR.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Off Calendar
